sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Uniti Group Launches Major Fiber Network Securitization Offering
feed.summary: Uniti Group's subsidiary, Kinetic ABS Issuer LLC, announced a $960.1 million secured fiber network revenue term notes offering, backed by residential fiber assets in five U.S. states. This securitization, coupled with planned variable and liquidity funding facilities, aims to provide financing flexibility for general corporate purposes, including capital expenditure and debt repayment. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates UNIT as Neutral due to strong valuation and positive corporate events, balanced by concerns over high leverage and declining free cash flow.

feed.title: Assessing Regencell Bioscience Holdings (RGC) Valuation After Surging Volatility And Ongoing DOJ Trading Investigation
feed.summary: Regencell Bioscience Holdings (RGC) has experienced significant share price volatility, including a 151.81% return in 7 days, amidst a U.S. Department of Justice trading investigation. Despite virtually no revenue and recent losses, the company trades at an extremely high price-to-book ratio of 5,380.1x, far exceeding industry averages. This valuation raises questions about investor expectations, with Simply Wall St deeming the stock overvalued and highlighting the risks associated with zero revenue and the ongoing investigation.

feed.title: Bull of the Day: Eli Lilly (LLY)
feed.summary: Eli Lilly (LLY) is highlighted as Zacks' "Bull of the Day" due to its strong position in the pharmaceutical market, particularly with its blockbuster obesity drugs Mounjaro and Zepbound. The article details the significant market for obesity treatments, Lilly's diverse product portfolio, strategic acquisitions, and a robust future pipeline. With anticipated strong EPS growth and a recent deal with the Trump administration to expand access to obesity drugs, LLY is positioned for continued long-term growth.

feed.title: Chipotle's big move into Tampa Bay
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill is significantly expanding its presence in the Tampa Bay area by opening four new locations, with plans for even more. The article lists several new Chipotle openings, including some that involve demolishing existing structures or backfilling vacant storefronts. This expansion highlights Chipotle's strategic growth in the region.

feed.title: Bhattacharya leaves offshore drilling company Schlumberger's investment unit
feed.summary: Arindam Bhattacharya has departed from his role as managing director of SLB Ventures, the corporate venture arm of oilfield services company Schlumberger (doing business as SLB). Bhattacharya served SLB for over 30 years in various capacities before leading SLB Ventures, which focuses on investments in industrial decarbonisation, renewables, and energy efficiency technologies. His next career steps were not disclosed.

feed.title: 8 agency reviews to know about: IBM, Kenvue, Papa John's, Reese's
feed.summary: The article highlights eight significant agency reviews currently underway involving major brands such as IBM, Kenvue, Papa John's, and Reese's. These reviews are important for agencies tracking new business opportunities in the advertising and marketing sector. The piece also briefly mentions other AI-related content from CES and weekly marketing winners and losers.

feed.title: How Bob Jordan charted a new course for Southwest Airlines
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines CEO Bob Jordan has spearheaded a significant transformation of the budget carrier, introducing assigned seating, options for extra legroom, and expanding ticketing beyond its website to travel sites. These changes, implemented over four years, have led to record revenues and outperformance against rivals, but also included the airline's first-ever layoffs. Jordan asserts that these shifts are a necessary evolution to meet customer demands and maintain competitiveness, while balancing the preservation of Southwest's core values.

feed.title: RPM International stock price target lowered to $126 at RBC Capital
feed.summary: RBC Capital has decreased its price target for RPM International (NYSE:RPM) to $126.00 from $132.00, while maintaining an Outperform rating. The adjustment follows RPM's fiscal second-quarter earnings miss due to shutdown issues, construction headwinds, and restructuring costs, despite which the company announced $100 million in annualized cost reductions. RBC Capital anticipates a seasonal recovery in RPM's Consumer segment and notes favorable factors such as infrastructure exposure and an attractive entry point, while other firms like JPMorgan and Evercore ISI also recently adjusted their ratings and price targets.

feed.title: Clean Electricity Acquisitions
feed.summary: Constellation has acquired Calpine Corporation from Energy Capital Partners, forming the largest electricity producer in the United States by installed capacity. This transaction combines Constellation’s nuclear fleet with Calpine’s natural gas and geothermal assets, aiming to provide reliable, lower-carbon power and broaden customer offerings. The combined entity boasts approximately 55 GW of generating capacity, with an eye towards enhanced grid reliability, expanded customer solutions, and operational scale.

feed.title: Discord Confidentially Files for IPO, Targeting Potential 2026 Debut
feed.summary: Discord has confidentially filed for an Initial Public Offering (IPO) with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, targeting a potential U.S. market debut around March 2026. The company is working with Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan Chase as lead underwriters. Discord was last valued at $14.7–15 billion and projects 2024 revenue of about $725 million with over 200 million monthly active users, having previously rejected a substantial acquisition offer from Microsoft in 2021.

feed.title: Wall Street Analysts Temper Outlook for Procter & Gamble Ahead of Earnings
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts have tempered their outlook for Procter & Gamble ahead of its quarterly earnings release, with firms like TD Cowen and Wells Fargo trimming price targets due to concerns over near-term growth prospects for fiscal 2026. The company is set to disclose its second fiscal quarter results on January 22, 2026, with market participants closely watching for signs of restored confidence. Despite the cautious sentiment, P&G remains a core holding for many investors, characterized by its "dividend king" status, although its near-term upside may be constrained.

feed.title: Hartford Multifactor US Equity ETF (NYSEARCA:ROUS) Sets New 12-Month High – Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Hartford Multifactor US Equity ETF (NYSEARCA:ROUS) recently hit a new 52-week high of $59.41, closing at $59.31 with significant trading volume. The ETF, which tracks an index of US large-cap stocks based on value, momentum, and quality factors, has a market cap of $509.26 million. Institutional investors have shown mixed activity, with some increasing and others reducing their stakes in ROUS.

feed.title: The Truth About EPAM Systems: Is This Sleeper Tech Stock About To Explode?
feed.summary: This article examines EPAM Systems (EPAM), a global IT and consulting firm, to determine if it's a worthwhile investment. It evaluates the company's current stock performance, market perception, and business model, comparing it to competitors like Accenture. The piece concludes that EPAM is a potentially high-risk, high-reward stock suitable for long-term, research-driven investors willing to tolerate volatility and bet on continued digital transformation.

feed.title: Citigroup (C) Receives a Rating Update from a Top Analyst
feed.summary: Citigroup (C) recently received a Buy rating from Ebrahim Poonawala of Bank of America Securities, with a consensus price target of $125.50. Wolfe Research also maintained a Buy rating with a $141.00 price target. The company reported strong financial results for the quarter ending September 30, with revenue of $43.84 billion and a net profit of $3.75 billion.

feed.title: Northrop to Integrate Autonomy Software With Kratos’ Valkyrie UAS Under $232M Marine Corps CCA Contract
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman has been awarded a $231.5 million contract by the U.S. Marine Corps to rapidly develop a collaborative combat aircraft (CCA). Under this agreement, Northrop will integrate its autonomous mission systems with Kratos' Valkyrie uncrewed aerial system to create an uncrewed aircraft capable of supporting crewed fighters in contested environments. This initiative, part of the MUX TACAIR program, aims to enhance sensing, strike, and survivability capabilities using an open architecture software called Prism.

feed.title: TCAL: New Buy-Write ETF With An Underwhelming Start
feed.summary: The T. Rowe Price Capital Appreciation Premium Income ETF (TCAL), an actively managed covered call fund launched in March 2025, offers a 10.67% yield. Despite its attractive yield and diversified portfolio, TCAL has significantly underperformed the S&P 500 and competitors since its inception. The article suggests caution due to its short track record and underperformance, recommending RDVI as a potentially more compelling alternative.

feed.title: P&G to revise Crest kids’ toothpaste packaging after Texas probe
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble has agreed to change the packaging and advertising for its Crest children's fluoride toothpaste following a probe by Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton. The revisions, which began rolling out on January 1, 2026, aim to ensure the amount of toothpaste depicted on packaging aligns with guidance for children. This settlement follows a similar agreement with Colgate in September 2025 regarding misleading imagery of fluoride toothpaste quantities.

feed.title: Elastio and NetApp Partner to Deliver Provable Recovery for NetApp Customers - The Tennessean
feed.summary: Elastio has joined NetApp's Technology Alliance Program to provide "provable recovery" solutions for NetApp customers, enhancing data integrity and ransomware recovery assurance across cloud, on-premises, and hybrid environments. This partnership aims to strengthen cyber resilience by continuously validating snapshots, backups, and replicated copies to detect encryption or corruption. The integrated solution offers early detection of ransomware impact and ensures recovery points are clean and ready, helping customers meet recovery-focused regulations.

feed.title: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. Trims Holdings in Walmart Inc. $WMT
feed.summary: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. reduced its stake in Walmart Inc. by 1.1% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 12,855 shares, but Walmart remains its 16th largest holding. Company insiders, including executives Kathryn J. Mclay and C. Douglas McMillon, have also been net sellers of Walmart stock recently. Despite these insider sales, Walmart exceeded its Q3 earnings and revenue estimates and received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $122.37.

feed.title: Clear Harbor Asset Management LLC Sells 15,925 Shares of Wells Fargo & Company $WFC
feed.summary: Clear Harbor Asset Management LLC reduced its stake in Wells Fargo & Company by 33.8%, selling 15,925 shares and retaining 31,168 shares valued at approximately $2.613 million. Wells Fargo recently surpassed quarterly earnings expectations and pays a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share. Analyst sentiment for WFC is mixed, with an average "Hold" rating and a price target of $93.91, despite some firms raising targets and others issuing downgrades.

feed.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. $REGN Stake Lifted by Clear Harbor Asset Management LLC
feed.summary: Clear Harbor Asset Management LLC increased its stake in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) by 26.3% during the third quarter, holding shares now valued at approximately $5.98 million. Several other institutional investors also significantly increased their positions, contributing to institutional ownership of about 83.31%. Despite some insider selling, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for REGN, with an average price target near $791.

feed.title: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. Has $94.70 Million Stock Position in Parker-Hannifin Corporation $PH
feed.summary: Ferguson Wellman Capital Management Inc. reduced its stake in Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) by 26% in Q3, now holding 124,908 shares valued at $94.7 million. Despite the reduction, PH remains a significant holding for Ferguson Wellman, and institutional investors collectively own 82.44% of the company's stock. Analysts rate Parker-Hannifin a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $932.11, following recent target increases from several firms.

feed.title: Stifel raises Thermo Fisher Scientific stock price target to $700 on biopharma growth outlook
feed.summary: Stifel has increased its price target for Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE:TMO) to $700.00 from $583.00, maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment is based on expectations of organic growth returning to mid-single-digit levels, driven by improvements in the biopharma sector, and projected high-single-digit earnings per share growth. The firm anticipates strong quarterly execution and accelerated growth will lead to further upside for the stock.

feed.title: Here's What Analysts Think About Capital One Financial Corporation (COF)
feed.summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE: COF) has recently received several positive rating updates from analysts, with price targets being lifted by Goldman Sachs, Barclays, Wells Fargo, and Keefe Bruyette. The upgrades are based on trends in the consumer finance sector, solid guidance for 2026, and expectations of declining card/auto NCOs. Analysts anticipate positive performance for Capital One, with some firms maintaining Buy, Overweight, and Outperform ratings.

feed.title: Cambria Shareholder Yield ETF $SYLD Stock Position Reduced by Commonwealth Equity Services LLC
feed.summary: Commonwealth Equity Services LLC recently reduced its stake in Cambria Shareholder Yield ETF (SYLD) by 16.7%, selling 65,498 shares and holding 325,869 shares valued at $22.37 million. Despite this, several other institutional investors increased their positions in SYLD. The ETF recently traded at $73.06, has a market cap of $1.05 billion, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.1984 per share.

feed.title: Euro Slides to December Low Ahead of US Data
feed.summary: The euro fell to a December low against the US dollar ahead of key US economic data, specifically the December nonfarm payrolls report. A strong US jobs report would further reduce the likelihood of Federal Reserve interest rate cuts, while easing inflation in the eurozone suggests the European Central Bank is unlikely to tighten policy, contributing to the euro's decline.

feed.title: CX Institutional Reduces Stock Position in Capital One Financial Corporation $COF
feed.summary: CX Institutional significantly reduced its stake in Capital One Financial Corporation by 86.3% in Q3, selling over 27,000 shares. Despite this, other major institutions like Vanguard and State Street substantially increased their positions, maintaining high institutional ownership. Analyst sentiment remains largely positive, with several firms raising price targets and a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating, supported by a recent dividend increase.

feed.title: CX Institutional Grows Holdings in Cummins Inc. $CMI
feed.summary: CX Institutional significantly increased its stake in Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) by 174.0% in the third quarter, bringing their total holdings to 5,419 shares valued at approximately $2.29 million. This occurred despite recent insider selling by top executives, while institutional ownership remains high at 83.46% and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for the company. Cummins also reported strong Q3 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates for both EPS and revenue, and announced a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: BMO Capital downgrades Essex Property Trust stock on California headwinds By Investing.com
feed.summary: BMO Capital has downgraded Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) from Outperform to Market Perform and lowered its price target to $280.00 due to anticipated headwinds in California. These challenges include moderating FFO growth from Los Angeles weakness and preferred redemptions, alongside potential impacts from California policy initiatives like a wealth tax and rent control. Despite strong third-quarter earnings in 2025 and a long history of dividend payments, analysts from Truist Securities and Jefferies have also adjusted their ratings and price targets for ESS, reflecting a mixed outlook for the REIT.

feed.title: Perrigo Company plc Sued for Securities Law Violations -
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a notice to shareholders of Perrigo Company plc (NYSE: PRGO) regarding a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Perrigo made materially false and misleading statements concerning significant underinvestment and manufacturing deficiencies in its infant formula business acquired from Nestlé, leading to overstated financial results. Shareholders who purchased PRGO shares between February 27, 2023, and November 4, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm before the lead plaintiff deadline of January 16, 2026.

feed.title: Soleno Therapeutics (SLNO) Among Stocks That Will Bounce Back According to Analysts
feed.summary: Soleno Therapeutics (NASDAQ: SLNO) is identified by analysts as a stock expected to bounce back, with LifeSci Capital reiterating a Buy rating and Piper Sandler forecasting transformational growth in 2026. The company recently announced positive pivotal study results for VYKAT XR, published in a medical journal, supporting its FDA approval for Prader-Willi syndrome. Soleno Therapeutics focuses on developing treatments for rare diseases, though Insider Monkey suggests other AI stocks might offer greater return potential.

feed.title: NTCL Stock Price and Chart — NASDAQ:NTCL
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of NTCL Stock Price and Chart for NETCLASS TECHNOLOGY INC on NASDAQ. It includes key financial stats like market capitalization, revenue, and net income, alongside details about the company's operations, sector, and employees. The article also covers stock performance, technical analysis indicators, and answers frequently asked questions regarding its price, volatility, and dividend policy.

feed.title: Tributary Capital Management LLC Raises Stock Holdings in Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. $NOG
feed.summary: Tributary Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. (NYSE:NOG) by 146.3% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 1,312,256 shares valued at $32.54 million. Other major institutional investors also boosted their positions, with overall institutional ownership in NOG standing at 98.8%. The company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45, translating to an 8.8% yield, while analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with an average price target of $33.25.

feed.title: Cerity Partners LLC Lowers Holdings in Exxon Mobil Corporation $XOM
feed.summary: Cerity Partners LLC marginally reduced its stake in Exxon Mobil Corporation by 0.7% in Q3, selling 14,586 shares, but still holds nearly 2 million shares valued at $225.48 million. Other institutional investors like Eagle Capital Management and Acadian Asset Management increased their holdings. The company recently raised its quarterly dividend to $1.03, resulting in an annualized dividend of $4.12, but faces near-term headwinds due to falling liquids prices potentially impacting fourth-quarter earnings.

feed.title: BMO Capital upgrades Mid-America Apartment Communities stock rating By Investing.com
feed.summary: BMO Capital has upgraded Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) from Market Perform to Outperform, raising its price target to $158.00 from $150.00. This upgrade is based on expectations of decelerating supply and potential job growth in Sunbelt apartment REITs for 2026, with MAA's affordable rents and potential cap rate compression being key factors. MAA also recently increased its quarterly dividend, marking its 16th consecutive year of increases.

feed.title: Is Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness?
feed.summary: This article evaluates whether Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) stock, currently around US$22, offers good value after recent price declines. Using Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis, the stock is estimated to be 36.7% undervalued with an intrinsic value of $34.76 per share. A Price to Sales (P/S) ratio analysis also suggests undervaluation, with HPE's 0.86x P/S being below both the industry average and Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio of 2.45x.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs rebaixa ações da Mattel para Neutro devido a preocupações com crescimento
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs rebaixou as ações da Mattel (NASDAQ:MAT) de Compra para Neutro, estabelecendo um preço-alvo de US$ 21,00, devido ao recente desempenho superior da ação e à necessidade de maior clareza sobre as novas iniciativas de crescimento da empresa. O banco expressou cautela em relação ao ambiente macroeconômico e ao cenário de consumo de brinquedos para 2026, citando tarifas, aumentos de preços e o sentimento dos varejistas como desafios. A Mattel está se preparando para divulgar seus resultados em 11 de fevereiro de 2026, enquanto navega por uma reestruturação de dívidas e um atraso no lançamento de um produto com a OpenAI.
feed.source: Investing.com Brasil - Finanças, Câmbio e Investimentos

feed.title: Cerity Partners LLC Acquires 28,591 Shares of General Dynamics Corporation $GD
feed.summary: Cerity Partners LLC has increased its stake in General Dynamics Corporation by 38.6%, purchasing an additional 28,591 shares, bringing their total holdings to 102,605 shares valued at approximately $34.99 million. Other institutional investors like Pacer Advisors and Ameriprise Financial also significantly boosted their holdings. Despite positive institutional interest, a General Dynamics VP recently sold a substantial number of shares, reducing his stake by over 35%.

feed.title: John Deere fires up automation at CES
feed.summary: John Deere showcased its advanced automation technology at CES 2026, integrating AI and machine learning into its self-driving X9-1100 farm combine and Vogele road paver. This initiative addresses the scarcity of skilled labor and automates complex, tedious tasks in agriculture and construction. The equipment uses 4G and Starlink for connectivity, enabling real-time data sharing, remote diagnostics, and coordinated operations like in-air refueling for combines.

feed.title: The Boeing Company $BA Stock Position Raised by Cerity Partners LLC
feed.summary: Cerity Partners LLC increased its stake in The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) by 12.3% in Q3, now holding 147,578 shares valued at approximately $31.85 million. Other institutional investors also raised their positions, pushing institutional ownership to 64.82%. Despite a significant Q3 EPS miss, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $235.33, citing recent large aircraft orders and upcoming Q4 earnings as potential catalysts for the stock.

feed.title: Align Technology (ALGN) Is Up 9.2% After Raising Q4 Outlook And Setting 2025 Earnings Date
feed.summary: Align Technology (ALGN) recently saw its stock rise by 9.2% after raising its Q4 2025 revenue outlook and setting its full-year 2025 earnings release date for February 4, 2026. This announcement has focused investor attention on the company's ability to maintain clear aligner volume growth and protect margins amidst competition and economic pressures on elective treatments. While the firm forecasts $4.5 billion in revenue and $674.8 million in earnings by 2028, investor sentiment on its fair value varies widely, highlighting the importance of the upcoming earnings report.

feed.title: Cerity Partners LLC Has $32.49 Million Stake in Synopsys, Inc. $SNPS
feed.summary: Cerity Partners LLC increased its stake in Synopsys, Inc. to 65,852 shares, valued at $32.49 million, during the third quarter. Despite some insider selling from executives, analyst sentiment remains largely positive, with several firms raising price targets and a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating for the semiconductor company. Synopsys reported strong Q3 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates and showing significant year-over-year revenue growth.

feed.title: Cerity Partners LLC Boosts Stake in Altria Group, Inc. $MO
feed.summary: Cerity Partners LLC significantly increased its stake in Altria Group by 6.6% in the third quarter, now owning 575,041 shares valued at $37.99 million. Altria also announced a quarterly dividend of $1.06 per share, resulting in an annualized yield of 7.6%, and authorized a $2.0 billion share repurchase plan. The company's Q3 earnings beat analyst estimates, and it maintains a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $62.33.

feed.title: Commonwealth Equity Services LLC Sells 18,081 Shares of American Tower Corporation $AMT
feed.summary: Commonwealth Equity Services LLC reduced its stake in American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) by 12.9% in the third quarter, selling 18,081 shares and holding 122,544 shares valued at $23.57 million. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in AMT. American Tower announced a quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share, and analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $226.61, though some have recently trimmed their price objectives.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley downgrades Nucor stock to Equalweight on balanced risk-reward
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has downgraded Nucor (NYSE:NUE) stock from Overweight to Equalweight, while increasing its price target to $180. The firm cited a "balanced risk-reward with limited upside" and potential downside risks from soft demand conditions, despite forecasting robust cash generation. Nucor recently announced a projected decline in Q4 2025 earnings, a new president and COO, and an increased quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Google Bets On AI To Fix Email Overload With Gemini-Enhanced Gmail— What's New?
feed.summary: Google is integrating its Gemini AI model into Gmail to combat email overload, a significant update since Gmail's 2004 launch. New features include AI Overviews, which summarize lengthy email threads, and AI Inbox, which acts as a personalized briefing by highlighting priority emails and suggested to-dos. These tools aim to help users manage the high volume of weekly messages more efficiently.

feed.title: Danaher Corporation $DHR Shares Sold by Commonwealth Equity Services LLC
feed.summary: Commonwealth Equity Services LLC recently reduced its stake in Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) by 10.6% during the third quarter, selling 13,870 shares and retaining 117,335 shares valued at approximately $23.26 million. Despite this institutional selling, Danaher exceeded Q3 earnings expectations with an EPS of $1.89 against a consensus of $1.72 and announced a quarterly dividend. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with a target price of $249.92.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Company $CL Shares Purchased by Commonwealth Equity Services LLC
feed.summary: Commonwealth Equity Services LLC increased its stake in Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) by 20.9% in the third quarter, bringing their total holdings to 316,714 shares valued at approximately $25.32 million. Other institutional investors like Asset Management One Co. Ltd. and Gateway Investment Advisers LLC also increased their positions. Despite recent analyst price target trims, the stock maintains a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target of $88.19, and the company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.52.

feed.title: Commonwealth Equity Services LLC Cuts Stock Position in S&P Global Inc. $SPGI
feed.summary: Commonwealth Equity Services LLC reduced its stake in S&P Global Inc. by 5.0% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 2,551 shares and ending with 48,457 shares valued at approximately $23.58 million. S&P Global reported strong quarterly results and provided optimistic full-year 2025 guidance, while Wall Street analysts maintain a consensus "Buy" rating with an average price target of $615.14. Despite the institutional reduction, other funds either increased or initiated new positions in the company, showcasing mixed investor sentiment.

feed.title: Commonwealth Equity Services LLC Decreases Stake in Prudential Financial, Inc. $PRU
feed.summary: Commonwealth Equity Services LLC reduced its holdings in Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) by 7.7% in Q3 2025, selling 21,640 shares and now owning 258,194 shares valued at $26.8 million. Insider selling has also occurred, with Chairman Charles F. Lowrey and SVP Timothy L. Schmidt selling a combined 62,719 shares. Despite a current dividend yield of 4.5% and recent earnings of $3.58 per share on $8.35 billion revenue, analysts currently rate the stock as "Reduce" with an average price target of $118.60.
